title: Terraform State Lock Conflict Blocking Infrastructure Changes
symptoms: Terraform operations failing with 'Error locking state: ConditionalCheckFailedException'
DynamoDB state lock table showing stale lock from crashed pipeline
Lock owner showing terminated CI/CD pipeline job ID
Terraform Cloud workspace showing locked status
Multiple teams reporting inability to make infrastructure changes
root_cause: CI/CD pipeline crashed during terraform apply operation leaving a stale state lock in DynamoDB that was not automatically released, blocking all subsequent infrastructure operations
resolution: Manually removed the stale state lock from DynamoDB after verifying no active operations, ran terraform plan to confirm state consistency, and implemented automatic lock cleanup for crashed pipelines
preventive_actions: Implement automatic state lock cleanup for terminated pipeline jobs
Add state lock duration monitoring with alerts for locks exceeding 30 minutes
Create emergency state lock removal runbook with verification steps
Implement terraform lock timeout with automatic release after 1 hour
Add pipeline crash detection with automatic lock release webhook

timeline.event: CI/CD pipeline crashes during terraform apply
State lock remains in DynamoDB from crashed pipeline
Tom Williams attempts infrastructure change, encounters lock
Lock owner confirmed as terminated pipeline job
State consistency verified, no partial apply detected
Stale lock manually removed from DynamoDB
Terraform operations unblocked, pending changes applied

embedding_summary: Terraform state lock conflict from crashed CI/CD pipeline leaving stale lock in DynamoDB. All production infrastructure changes blocked for 1.5 hours including critical auto-scaling configuration. Resolved by manually removing stale lock and implementing automatic lock cleanup for crashed pipelines.
